title: Real-Time Gaming Platform
description: Large-scale multiplayer gaming platform with WebRTC, low-latency synchronization, and immersive browser rendering.
longDescription: Architected scalable frontend systems using Next.js, TypeScript, WebRTC, Socket.io, and Unreal Pixel Streaming for real-time communication and interactive multiplayer systems.

title: Evironmental Inclusion
description: Environmental Inclusion is the first global website dedicated to saving endangered animals. Their mission is straightforward: to rescue as many endangered animals as possible worldwide. They are also committed to raising awareness about the threats these animals face.

title: Plastindia 2026
description: PLASTINDIA 2026 is the ultimate event for the plastics industry, uniting global leaders, innovators, and professionals to showcase cutting-edge advancements and trends. This triennial event underscores PLASTINDIA's tradition of excellence and innovation.

title: Fullbridge
description: Fullbridge is a human-centered, AI-powered learning company that equips students and professionals with real-world business skills, bridging the gap between academic theory and workplace impact.

title: Vedobhava Ayurveda
description: Vedobhava ayurved offers personalized Ayurvedic care, focusing on natural healing and wellness.

title: QuayChain
description: Secure private LTE/5G networks and AI-powered edge technology for supply chain visibility and real-time data.
